threats.title: We Found Eight Attack Vectors Inside AWS Bedrock. Here's What Attackers Can Do with Them
threats.summary: AWS Bedrock is Amazon's platform for building AI-powered applications. It gives developers access to foundation models and the tools to connect those models directly to enterprise data and systems. threats.title: Microsoft Warns IRS Phishing Hits 29,000 Users, Deploys RMM Malware
threats.summary: Microsoft has warned of fresh campaigns that are capitalizing on the upcoming tax season in the U.S. to harvest credentials and deliver malware. threats.title: Trivy Hack Spreads Infostealer via Docker, Triggers Worm and Kubernetes Wiper
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have uncovered malicious artifacts distributed via Docker Hub following the Trivy supply chain attack, highlighting the widening blast radius across developer environments. threats.title: Hackers Exploit CVE-2025-32975 (CVSS 10.0) to Hijack Unpatched Quest KACE SMA Systems
threats.summary: Threat actors are suspected to be exploiting a maximum-severity security flaw impacting Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA), according to Arctic Wolf.
